description_long: This is a modern bungalow with a flat, multi-level roof and a clean, geometric design. The exterior features a combination of light tan and white walls, accented by large windows and a prominent front entrance with a small staircase. The property includes a detached garage, a driveway, and a fenced yard with patches of green lawn and several trees. The backyard area appears to have a patio or pool space, and the overall layout is open and spacious. The windows are arranged asymmetrically, providing a contemporary aesthetic. The structure is surrounded by a low fence and landscaping elements, making it suitable for a suburban or urban neighborhood.
description: A modern, flat-roofed bungalow with tan and white walls, large windows, a detached garage, and landscaped yard with trees and a patio area.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, staircase, detached garage, and several trees in the landscaped yard.
description_view_1: Rear and side view highlighting the backyard patio or pool area, driveway, and the open layout of the property.
description_view_2: Back view displaying the rear facade, garage, and more of the fenced yard with visible green space and trees.
description_view_3: Side view focusing on the driveway, side entrance, and the arrangement of the garage and main building.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with grouped side and front windows
